description: Validate an existing ZUGFeRD/Factur-X/E-Rechnung invoice. Accepts a base64-encoded PDF or raw CII XML. Runs the full three-validator check: PDF/A conformance, EN 16931 Schematron, and the official German KoSIT acceptance gate. No authentication required. Keywords: E-Rechnung prüfen, ZUGFeRD validier

labels.name: compliance_status
labels.description: Check the e-rechnung engine health: KoSIT + Mustang daemon status and dependency version pins vs. latest releases. Use before bulk invoice generation to confirm the compliance gate is fully operational.
